global.description: The ad features a full canvas background with the 'EarnPath' logo positioned in the top left corner. The main subject is highlighted by a prominent headline stating 'Track every euro' and supporting body text that reads 'Built for peace of mind', both centered in the middle of the ad. A call to action button labeled 'Start now' is located at the bottom center. The composition includes geometric shapes as decorative elements, enhancing the visual appeal without distracting from the main message.
global.visual_style: Modern flat design with high contrast
global.main_message: Encouraging users to track their investments for peace of mind

elements.label: EarnPath text logo
elements.description: The logo of the EarnPath app, displayed prominently in the upper left corner of the crop.

elements.label: Body text
elements.description: Supporting descriptive text below the headline.

elements.label: Call to Action Button
elements.description: A button with the text 'Start now' positioned at the bottom of the crop.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: A combination of a circle and a rectangle in a blue background, positioned towards the left side of the crop.

elements.label: Geometric shapes
elements.description: A combination of a circle and a rectangle in a blue background, positioned in the upper part of the crop.

embedding_texts.global_text: Mobile ad for EarnPath Invest promoting investment tracking.
